message.content:
@startuml
actor user
participant runtime #lightgrey
participant ibex #lightgrey
participant "ibex.sklearn" as sklearn_pkg #lightgrey
participant loader #lightgrey
participant "sklearn.linear_model" as linear_model #lightgrey

== Import Sequence ==
user ->> runtime : 1 import ibex.sklearn.linear_model\n(underlined)
runtime ->> ibex : 2 import ibex
activate ibex
deactivate ibex
runtime ->> sklearn_pkg : 3 import ibex.sklearn
activate sklearn_pkg
note right of sklearn_pkg: register sys.metapath
return 
deactivate sklearn_pkg
runtime ->> loader : 5 import ibex.sklearn.linear_model
loader ->> linear_model : 6 dir
linear_model --> loader : 7 members
loader -> loader : 8 inspect
loader -> loader : 9 wrap
@enduml
